dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HRES 1426 IH: Remembering the life of Corey Comperatore who passed away on Saturday, July 13, 2024.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Kelly of Pennsylvania (for himself, Ms. Tenney, Mrs. Houchin, Mr. Cloud, Mr. Fitzpatrick, Mr. Thompson of Pennsylvania, Mr. Meuser, Mr. Fuller, Mr. Steube, Mr. Hunt, Mr. McDowell, Mr. Langworthy, Mr. Rulli, and Mr. Moore of Alabama) submitted the following resolution; which was referred to the Committee on Oversight and Government Reform

form.official-title: Remembering the life of Corey Comperatore who passed away on Saturday, July 13, 2024.

whereas.text: Whereas Corey Comperatore was from Sarver, Pennsylvania, leaving behind his wife, Helen, and two daughters, Allyson and Kaylee;
Whereas Corey Comperatore was a respected community leader who dedicated years of service to the Buffalo Township Volunteer Fire Department of Sarver, Pennsylvania;
Whereas Corey Comperatore served his country as a veteran of the United States Army Reserves;
Whereas Corey Comperatore left behind a legacy of service for his country and his community, a devoted member of the Cabot Methodist Church; and
Whereas Corey Comperatore died a hero, protecting his family, shielding his wife and daughter from danger: Now, therefore, be it

paragraph.text: mourns the loss of Corey Comperatore, a husband, father, volunteer firefighter, community leader, and hero from Sarver, Pennsylvania; and
commemorates and celebrates the selfless and courageous life of Corey Comperatore.
